HomeOnboard Vertical

Spin up your vertical on our Odoo platform

Submit your business profile, target vertical, and BRD. Our BA team reviews and the platform provisions automatically.

1. Intake

Tell us about your company and modules you need.

2. BA Review

BRD analysis + cross-vertical impact assessment.

3. Go Live

VPS provisioned, modules deployed, UAT, then live.
